summary: The faithfulness checker learned a genuinely new shape this cycle — a^n mod m, a fixed base raised to the variable exponent — decided soundly over the multiplicative-order period (the sound, active repair of an extension that had been inert at the production bound). It is a genre the engine literally could not state before, and it used it: 16 of the 23 kernel-verified laws are a^n mod m facts (2^n mod 7 in {1,2,4}; 7^n mod 16 in {1,7,9,15}; ...), none gamed, the trust boundary intact. The structural metric — which only understands polynomials — went blind to 70% of the output (it had understood 100% the cycle before), the signature of a genre that genuinely left the old language. Yet a blind panel of four independent graders rated every one of them textbook or a restatement: zero genuinely novel. These are the standard cyclic behaviour of powers modulo a number. Read against the prior cycle (which moved the proposer's source to no novelty effect), this locates the wall precisely: neither the proposer nor the contract language is the bottleneck — the bounded, mechanically-checkable trust model itself caps the daemon at elementary mathematics. A measured, re-checkable result, not a lament.
